PrivateIp.description: Cluster API Server private IPv4 address.

PublicIp.description: Cluster API Server public IPv4 address

PublicAccessNetworkConfig.description: Public access network configuration. This parameter is returned only when ApiServerPublicAccessEnable=true

ApiServerEndpoints.description: Cluster API Server access IPv4 address information

ApiServerPublicAccessConfig.description: Cluster API Server public access configuration. This parameter is returned only when ApiServerPublicAccessEnable=true

ApiServerPublicAccessEnabled.description: Node public access configuration. Parameter value description: false: Disabled. true: Enabled

IpFamily.description: Cluster network protocol stack. Parameter value description: Ipv4: Ipv4 single stack. Ipv6: [Invitation test · Trial application] Ipv6 single stack. DualStack: [Invitation test · Trial application] Ipv4 and Ipv6 dual stack

ResourcePublicAccessDefaultEnabled.description: Node public access configuration. Parameter value description: false: Disabled. true: Enabled

SecurityGroupIds.description: Security group used by the cluster control plane and nodes.

SubnetIds.description: Subnet ID for cluster control plane communication within the private network.

VpcId.description: Private network (VPC) ID where the cluster control plane and some nodes are located.

ComponentConfig.description: Configuration for a single monitoring component, used to control whether the component is enabled.

Enabled.description: Whether to enable this monitoring component. true means enabled; false means disabled.

Name.description: Name of the monitoring component, such as 'prometheus', 'grafana', etc.

MaxPodsPerNode.description: Maximum number of Pod instances per node for the Flannel container network model. Values: 64 (default), 16, 32, 128, 256.

PodCidrs.description: Pod CIDR for Flannel container network.

SubnetIds.description: List of Pod subnet IDs for the Flannel container network model.

IrsaConfig.description: IRSA (IAM Role for Service Account) capability parameter configuration

Enabled.description: Whether to enable IRSA feature. Parameter values: true: enabled; false: not enabled.

Issuer.description: OIDC (OpenID Connect) provider URL, the unique identifier for the OIDC provider.

JwksUrl.description: JWKS (JSON Web Key Set) URL. The public keys in the file are used to verify any JWT (JSON Web Tokens) returned from the OIDC provider.

OpenIdConfigUrl.description: OIDC provider configuration document in JSON format, containing information about the OIDC provider.

Enabled.description: Whether to enable this log option. Parameter values: true: enabled; false: not enabled.

LogTopicId.description: TLS log topic ID for the collection target. If empty, the corresponding log topic has not been created.

LogTtl.description: Retention period of logs in log service, in days. 3650 days means permanent storage.

LogType.description: Currently enabled log types. Parameter values: Audit: cluster audit log; KubeApiServer: kube-apiserver component log; KubeScheduler: kube-scheduler component log; KubeControllerManager: kube-controller-manager component log.

LogProjectId.description: Cluster log project (Log Project) ID. If empty, the cluster log project has not been created.

MonitoringConfig.description: Cluster monitoring configuration, used to define monitoring components and workspace information.

EnableMetricsExternalCollection.description: Whether to enable external Prometheus to collect control plane component metrics for the cluster. Parameter values: true: enabled. false: not enabled.

WorkspaceId.description: Workspace ID to which the monitoring data belongs.

CreatingCount.description: Total number of nodes in Phase=Creating.

DeletingCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Deleting.

FailedCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Failed.

RunningCount.description: Total number of nodes with Phase=Running.

UpdatingCount.description: Total number of nodes in Phase=Updating.

PodNetworkMode.description: Container (Pod) network model (CNI). Parameter values: Flannel: Flannel network model, an independent underlay container network model. VpcCniShared: VPC-CNI network model, an underlay container network model implemented with ENI (Elastic Network Interface) on a private network.

Ipv4.description: IPv4 address of the private network IP.

Bandwidth.description: Peak bandwidth of the public IP, unit: Mbps

BillingType.description: Billing type for public IP: 2: Pay-as-you-go by bandwidth cap. 3: Pay-as-you-go by actual traffic.

Isp.description: Line type of the public IP. Parameter value description: BGP: BGP (multi-line)

Ipv4.description: IPv4 address of the public IP.

ServiceCidrsv4.description: IPv4 private network address exposed by Kubernetes Service.

SubnetIds.description: List of Pod subnet IDs for the VPC-CNI container network model.

TrunkEniEnabled.description: Whether to enable Trunk mode for the VPC-CNI container network model

description: Container Service deeply integrates next-generation cloud-native technologies to provide high-performance Kubernetes cluster management centered on containers. Build highly available Kubernetes clusters in the cloud with one click and achieve visualized full lifecycle management of containerized applications, helping users quickly build containerized applications.

ClusterConfig.description: Network configuration for the cluster control plane and some nodes.

CreatedTime.description: Cluster creation time. Standard RFC3339 format, UTC+0.

DeleteProtectionEnabled.description: Cluster deletion protection. Values: false (default): Deletion protection is disabled. true: Deletion protection is enabled; the cluster cannot be deleted directly.

Description.description: Cluster description. Maximum length is 300 characters.

IrsaConfig.description: IRSA (IAM Role for Service Account) capability parameter configuration

KubernetesVersion.description: Cluster Kubernetes version in the format x.xx. When creating a cluster, the system automatically matches the latest VKE version corresponding to this Kubernetes version (for query use)

KubernetesVersionCreate.description: Kubernetes version of the cluster, in the format x.xx. When creating a cluster, the system automatically matches the latest VKE version corresponding to this Kubernetes version. (For creation)

Name.description: Cluster name. Must be unique within the same region. Supports uppercase and lowercase English letters, Chinese characters, numbers, and hyphens (-). Length must be 2–64 characters.

NodeStatistics.description: Statistics of node counts for each main status in the cluster.

ProjectName.description: Project name to which the cluster belongs. A cluster can belong to only one project. Only English letters, numbers, underscores (_), periods (.), and hyphens (-) are allowed. Maximum length: 64 characters. Default: default.

UpdatedTime.description: Last update time of the cluster. Standard RFC3339 format, UTC+0.
